name: Machu Picchu Foods
description: Machu Picchu Foods offers cocoa powder as part of their product lineup, which is perfect for enhancing your snacks.

name: JB Cocoa
description: JB Cocoa offers a wide range of cocoa powder with varying pH values, applications, and fat content, making it suitable for both cocoa beverages and confectionery. Their state-of-the-art processing facilities ensure high quality in their cocoa ingredient products.

name: Blommer Chocolate Company
description: Blommer Chocolate Company is a leading cocoa processor in North America, specializing in cocoa bean processing and offering a range of cocoa products, including cocoa powders. The company emphasizes sustainable farming practices and has a strong reputation for quality and customer service.

name: DACK Trading LLC
description: DACK is a global agricultural broker that connects buyers and sellers of various agricultural products, including cocoa powder.

name: Kerry
description: Kerry offers a line of Simply Nature™ cocoa extracts and chocolate flavors, derived from high-quality cocoa beans, suitable for various applications including beverages, dairy, bakery, and savory products. Their expertise in taste insights and innovations positions them as a valuable partner for brands looking to enhance their cocoa offerings.

name: Cocoa Family
description: Cacao Family Farms produces natural Cacao Powder (10-12%) and offers a variety of cacao products, including Cacao Paste and Cacao Nibs, sourced from their unique processing methods.

name: República del Cacao
description: The company offers a range of cocoa products, including cocoa powder with a cacao content of 22-24%. Their commitment to quality and sustainability is reflected in their B Corp certification and collaboration with top chefs and chocolatiers.

name: COCOASOURCE
description: Cocoasource is a commodity trading company that emphasizes sustainability and direct sourcing, which may enhance the quality and ethical production of cocoa products. Their commitment to improving the welfare of farmers and their communities suggests a focus on high-quality cocoa sourcing practices.

name: PT. SAIRA FAZAL INDONESIA
description: Cocoa Merchant is a leading Indonesian brand that specializes in high-quality cocoa powder, offering a variety of products including natural and alkalized options. Their cocoa powder is noted for its rich aroma and great taste, making it suitable for various applications.

name: Jeeva Organic Private Limited
description: Jeeva Organic supplies premium organic cocoa powder sourced from authentic beans, making it a key player for those seeking high-quality chocolate ingredients in bulk.
